backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (animated envelope, letter styling, background gradient, Google Fonts) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, styling details, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Google Fonts imports for Cinzel, Great Vibes, Dancing Script, Playfair Display, and Poppins, and the React root mount point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a dark radial gradient background with StarBackground particles, a centered Envelope wrapping LetterContent, and a fixed gold footer attribution.
frontend/src/components/EntryButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/Envelope.tsx: Animated burgundy envelope component with a triangular flap, two-tone side panels, a circular wax seal with a gold heart, and a letter panel that rises out when clicked to toggle open state.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file with no implemented component.
Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/HeartCanvas.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
Decorative wine-tinted semi-transparent letter surface with gold border, corner ornaments, backdrop blur, bloomIn animation, and a scrollable inner content area.
frontend/src/components/LetterContent.ts: Love letter content component with a Dancing Script burgundy header, gold ornament divider, Playfair Display justified body paragraphs, and a Dancing Script signature footer.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented component.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: A styled gold-gradient button component with hover scale and glow effects, labeled 'To My Priya' with an envelope emoji.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: A fixed full-screen decorative background component that renders animated twinkling star particles and floating hearts/sparkles using inline styles and CSS animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file reserved for a background music hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file reserved for a heart animation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for React Query backend hooks; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/utilities, CSS custom properties for a dark gold/parchment theme, font utilities, and keyframe animations for envelope and letter reveal effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with gold colors, serif/display font families, custom box shadows, border radii, and keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, versioning, architectural notes, and implemented/requested features for the 'A Letter for Priya' romantic web page. Documents four completed features covering the animated envelope component, letter panel styling, dark background gradient, and Google Fonts loading.
